title: Essential gray dress
description: Discover the essential casual dress, designed for those looking for an outfit that is elegant, sober and comfortable. Its fluid fabric accompanies movements with lightness, offering a pleasant sensation throughout the day. Its wide rolled-up sleeves add a touch of modernity, while the discreet clip system holds the sleeves. Designed to adapt to all occasions, this dress embodies a simple elegance, perfect for a style that is both modest and sophisticated. Pockets. Its fluid and refined look makes it a must-have piece. To finish, we paired it with a black premium Jersey hijab.
